particulars.description: A fixed charge on all f/h and l/h property together with all fixtures and fittings (including trade fixtures and fittings) and fixed plant and machinery from time to time; all goodwill unpaid and/or uncalled capital for the time being of the company.. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
